REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (31 Walter Street, San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Duane Leonard for Miriam Desmukes.

Mr. Leonard announced the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $775,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $310,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Duane Leonard for the Petitioner.

There being no objections, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same). The bond is set at $185,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith and A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Continued To Jun-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Chris Dismukes (Grandson of the Decedent).

This was a pre-granted matter. The Court continued the matter to June 18, 2008 to allow Mr. Dismukes to seek Counsel.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
